# HPS clock manager PLL information.
#
# Each line describes the PLL constraints for one or more speedgrades. This
# information is used for calculating clock manager PLL parameters.
#
# Format for each line is:
# 
# {DEVICE_SPEEDGRADE} {{MAIN_PLL_VCO} {PERIPH_PLL_VCO} {MAX_MPU_CLK MAX_MAIN_CLK MAX_DBG_BASE_CLK}}
# 

# Cyclone V speed grades
{5C.+C6E?S?} {{320000000 1850000000} {320000000 1000000000} {925000000 400000000 400000000}}   
{5C.+C7E?S?} {{320000000 1600000000} {320000000 1000000000} {800000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5C.+I7E?S?} {{320000000 1600000000} {320000000 1000000000} {800000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5C.+I7.+}   {{320000000 1600000000} {320000000 1000000000} {800000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5C.+A7E?S?} {{320000000 1400000000} {320000000 1000000000} {700000000 350000000 350000000}}
{5C.+C8S?} {{320000000 1200000000} {320000000 1000000000} {600000000 300000000 300000000}}
{5C.+C8ES} {{320000000 1600000000} {320000000 1000000000} {800000000 400000000 400000000}}

# Arria V speed grades
{5A.+I3E?S?} {{320000000 1850000000} {320000000 1000000000} {1050000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5A.+C4E?S?} {{320000000 1850000000} {320000000 1000000000} {925000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5A.+C5E?S?} {{320000000 1600000000} {320000000 1000000000} {800000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5A.+I5E?S?} {{320000000 1600000000} {320000000 1000000000} {800000000 400000000 400000000}}
{5A.+C6E?S?} {{320000000 1400000000} {320000000 1000000000} {700000000 350000000 350000000}}
